creative_brief: Photo-style image: a real moment at the Brookvale hub where a farmer and a customer are talking over a counter with recognisable produce (pork cuts, eggs). Warm lighting, no text overlay. Community feel, not retail feel.
primary_text:
Last Tuesday at our Brookvale hub, a customer asked who raised the pork in her bag.

The farmer from Bundarra answered. He was standing right next to her.

That moment doesn't happen at a supermarket. It happens when the people who grow your food and the people who eat it share the same room.

Now those same customers want to own a piece of what we're building together. Not just shop here. Belong here.

No commitment. Order when you want. Collect from Brookvale Monday to Friday.
headline: Customers became partners. Here's why.
description: A farm-direct grocery store you can actually be part of. From paddock to hub to you.
